37.title: Context Clues Detective
37.instructions: When you meet an unfamiliar word in a story, the words around it often give you clues to its meaning. Read each sentence and use context clues to figure out what the bold word means.

questions.sentence: The sorcerer's desperation to get the lamp before Aladdin asked questions was the mistake that gave everything away.
The thieves had been accumulating their treasure for many years — chests of gold, silks, jewels piled to the ceiling.
Morgiana was resourceful — every time a new problem appeared, she had already thought of the answer.
Standing on the island with water in every direction and no sail on the horizon, Sinbad felt utterly desolate.

38.title: Word Roots Explorer
38.instructions: Many English words come from Greek and Latin roots. Understanding these roots helps you figure out new words. Match each root to its meaning, then identify words that use that root.

questions.question: Why is the time period called 'medieval'?
options: It was in the middle ages between ancient and modern times
questions.answer: It was in the middle ages between ancient and modern times

questions.question: If something is 'invisible,' what is it?
